name: TestWaitForMostAsRegistry
title: TestWaitForMostAsRegistry
syntax: long TestWaitForMostAsRegistry(long aRegistry, unsigned long aTimeout);
description: The function waits for the specified time period for any change to a registry in the application socket.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.description: Wait for changes in the local registry
Wait for changes in the global registry
Wait for changes in all registries
